segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a young man portraying a comedic substitute teacher, dressed in a blue hoodie with 'LUKE' printed on it, a red hoodie pulled over his head, and black-framed glasses. With a slightly higher-pitched, comedic voice, he announces an essay assignment, stating, "Says you have to write an essay about yourself." Another young man, playing a student in a white Hollister t-shirt, enthusiastically responds, "Why don't we finish this fast as possible so we could go play on the computers?" followed by "That's a good idea!" Upbeat background music accompanies the rapid sounds of hands writing on paper. The student proudly declares, "Mrs. Spatula, we're done!" The substitute, now with a black hat added to his headwear, responds in the same comedic voice, "Well done, boys, keep those somewhere safe so you could give them to Mr. Loo tomorrow. Now you guys can play on the computers for the rest of the class," as students cheer, "Yes! Let's go baby!" The scene shifts to the next day, with the substitute now wearing a black and gray plaid robe over his hoodie, greeting the class with a deeper, more serious voice, "Good morning class. You guys can continue working on the assignment from yesterday." The student, still in his white t-shirt, eagerly says, "Let's go hand them in," to which the substitute, with a surprised tone, asks, "You're done already?" Suddenly, the substitute's voice turns angry, exclaiming, "This isn't what you're supposed to do!" The confused student asks, "What do you mean?" The substitute clarifies, "You were supposed to write an essay about someone else!" The student reacts with a shocked "What?!" as the substitute commands, "Now go redo it!" A paper crumpling sound emphasizes the student's dismay, who then distraughtly protests, "What the heck? I followed the instructions, sir!" The substitute dismissively grunts, "Hmmph." segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a Young Man, wearing a light gray long-sleeve shirt, seated in front of a green screen backdrop. He speaks directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, his clear and enthusiastic voice captured by a black microphone on a boom arm to his left. The time '2:40AM' is displayed in the bottom right corner, and he confirms, "It's currently 2:40 AM," explaining he just finished a gaming video and uploads large files, noting a "25 gigabytes" file takes "forever" to upload overnight. He discusses his late-night options: going to bed or watching YouTube. He then holds up a red and blue 'EHP Labs' shaker bottle, stating, "Every night for the past few months anyway, I have this." On-screen text appears, detailing the protein shake's ingredients and nutritional information (1020 calories, 63g protein), which he refers to, mentioning "1000 calories and I think like 50 grams of protein." He gives a "Shout out to my dad" for making it, explaining his mom went to bed and the blender is "really loud." He continues to use the shaker bottle as a prop, explaining he "can't go to sleep now 'cause I gotta drink this thing," which takes a long time, providing an "excuse I get to watch some YouTube videos," though it will mess up his sleep schedule. He concludes by clarifying his routine isn't always this late, as video and TikTok creation times vary.
